Income.description: Income classification of respondents, column variable in the two-way table, used to define event A (Income > $50,000).

Age.description: Age classification of respondents, row variable in the two-way table, used to define event B (Age ≥ 30).

Respondent_Percentage.description: Percentage of total respondents in each Age–Income cell of the two-way table, summed over appropriate cells to compute marginal probabilities P(A) and P(B).
